name: Delaware DPR Board of Plumbing and HVACR License Lookup
updateFrequency: unknown; verify current credential status through DELPROS before relying on freshness assumptions
licenseTypesIncluded: Temporary plumber or HVACR licenses where applicable
knownExclusions: This entry covers plumbing and HVACR credentials only; contractor registration, electrical, asbestos, local permits, and business licenses are separate sources.
Restricted HVACR credentials limit practice to listed specialties and must not be treated as an unrestricted HVACR authorization.

Pool/spa, solar, and sheet-metal coverage is limited to scopes that fall within plumbing, HVACR, gas piping, ventilation, commercial hoods, refrigeration, air conditioning, or related Delaware credential requirements.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Use the official DELPROS lookup manually and do not automate portal traffic unless access controls and terms are reviewed.
publicRecordsNotes: Official credential lookup metadata only. Absence from one credential type is not proof that no other Delaware authorization exists.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: DPR offers online verification and roster requests, but no stable public bulk file or API contract has been reviewed for this board.
researchNotes: The Board of Plumbing, Heating, Ventilation, Air Conditioning and Refrigeration Examiners issues master plumber, master HVACR, and restricted HVACR credentials through DPR and DELPROS. This source remains a manual handoff until a stable, permitted machine interface is reviewed.
verificationCaveats: Preserve the credential type and restricted/unrestricted scope from DELPROS.
No match means no matching plumbing or HVACR credential record was found in this source at the checked time, not that no authorization exists elsewhere.
verificationNotes: No supported adapter is exposed while the shared DELPROS portal lacks a reviewed stable machine-readable contract.
maintainerNotes: Keep plumbing/HVACR credential records separate from Delaware contractor-registration, electrical, asbestos, and municipal permit records.

researchEvidence.note: Official board page states that the Board issues master plumber, master HVACR, and master restricted HVACR licenses.
Official HVACR licensure page describes unrestricted and restricted HVACR scopes including ventilation, commercial hood systems, refrigeration, air conditioning, and gas piping.
Official DELPROS license lookup is the public verification path for Delaware professional licenses.
Delaware.gov privacy and terms material reviewed; redistribution rights for normalized registry datasets remain unconfirmed.

blocker.summary: The shared DELPROS verification portal has no reviewed stable public machine-readable contract for plumbing and HVACR credentials.
